Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. batchRevoke(bytes32,(bytes32[],bytes,byt.details: More gas-efficient than individual revocations. The new accumulator value      is V' = V^{∏ H(cred_i)} mod N.

params.batch: Batch update containing credentials and proof

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

params.initialValue: Initial accumulator value (typically the generator g)

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.credentialHash: Hash of the credential to revoke
params.newValue: New accumulator value: V' = V^{H(credential)} mod N

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.verifier: Address of a contract implementing IExponentiationVerifier

params.generator: A generator g of the quadratic residues mod N
params.rsaModulus: The RSA modulus N (must be ≥ 2048 bits)

params.circuitId: Circuit ID for the non-membership proof circuit
params.verifier: Address of a contract implementing IZKVerifier

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

verifyNonMembership(bytes32,(bytes,bytes.details: Delegates to the external IZKVerifier for Groth16 proof verification.      The ZK circuit proves knowledge of a Bézout non-membership witness      (d, b) such that d^{H(e)} · V^b ≡ g (mod N), without revealing d or b.

params.witness: Non-membership witness (used for public input derivation)

returns.valid: True if the credential is confirmed non-revoked
True if non-revoked at the given epoch

HASH_TO_PRIME_DOMAIN().notice: Domain separator for hashing credentials to primes

NON_MEMBERSHIP_CIRCUIT_ID().notice: Circuit ID for the non-membership ZK proof circuit

batchRevoke(bytes32,(bytes32[],bytes,byt.notice: Batch revoke multiple credentials in a single transaction.

exponentiationVerifier().notice: External Wesolowski proof verifier (uses MODEXP precompile)

getCurrentState(bytes32).notice: Get the current accumulator value hash and epoch

getWitnessUpdateDelta(bytes32,uint256).notice: Get the witness update delta for an epoch

isRevoked(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Check if a credential is explicitly revoked

linkRegistry(bytes32,address).notice: Link an accumulator to a credential registry contract.

publishWitnessUpdate(bytes32,(uint256,ui.notice: Publish a witness update delta for holders.

revokeCredential(bytes32,bytes32,bytes,b.notice: Revoke a single credential by adding it to the accumulator.

setExponentiationVerifier(address).notice: Set the external Wesolowski exponentiation verifier.

setParameters(bytes,bytes,uint256).notice: Set the RSA accumulator parameters (one-time setup).

setZKVerifier(address,bytes32).notice: Set the external Groth16 ZK verifier for non-membership proofs.

verifyNonMembership(bytes32,(bytes,bytes.notice: Verify that a credential is NOT in the revocation accumulator.

verifyNonMembershipAtEpoch(bytes32,(byte.notice: Verify non-membership at a historical epoch (point-in-time check).

zkVerifier().notice: External Groth16 ZK proof verifier (uses BN254 pairing precompile)
